description: Import the site plan image from 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\warehouse_site_plan.png' into SketchUp (File > Import > verify 'Use as Image' is selected). Place it on the ground plane. Use the Tape Measure tool to measure the black 'Scale Reference' line at the bottom of the image, and type '25m' to scale the entire model so the line is exactly 25 meters long in the SketchUp space. Trace the gray building footprint using drawing tools, extrude it to a height of 8 meters using Push/Pull, and select the roof face. Finally, use the Skelion plugin to install a flush-mount solar panel array (landscape orientation) covering the roof. Save the completed model to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\scaled_warehouse.skp'.
